topic: How B2B SaaS Companies Can Build a Content Marketing Engine That Actually Drives Pipeline
target_audience: Heads of Marketing and Content Leads at B2B SaaS companies ($1M-$20M ARR) struggling with content production at scale
angle: Most content marketing advice is generic. This piece should give a specific, opinionated framework based on what actually works for SaaS companies at this stage.
required_sections: Why most SaaS content strategies fail
notes: Avoid generic advice. Every section should have a specific takeaway. No fluff intros.
